description: The instructional text on the screen updates from 'Great. To start...' to 'Okay, I see your', indicating the system has detected the screen share and is moving to the next step.

description: The user is reading the on-screen instructions during the setup phase of the session.

description: The task instruction text is being progressively revealed on the screen.

description: User is reading the task instructions as they are being displayed on the screen.

description: The 'Open' button appears in the center of the screen.

The 'Repeat the task instructions' button appears on the screen.
User dwells on the instruction screen, reading the task prompt 'What are you thinking right now?' and subsequent instructions as they appear.
